\tzpentry{ID3521}{Field Strength Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3521 introduces Field Strength Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \mathcal{F}\{\delta(t - t_0)\} = e^{-i 2\pi f t_0} \]
